title: Crisp Crunchy Norwegian Mattor Bread
description: A traditional Norwegian dish featuring a bitter flavor profile, pillowy texture and refreshing mint glaze, perfect for a snappy snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine mattor dough, yeast, salt and 70 grams of almond milk. Mix well to combine.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until a smooth dough forms.
Transfer the dough to a greased surface and shape into a round loaf.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with a damp cloth and let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet and brush the melted coconut oil on top.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the bread is golden brown.
While the bread is baking, prepare the honey glaze by whisking together 120 grams of honey and 50 grams of almond milk.
Remove the bread from the oven and brush the honey glaze on top.
Transfer the bread to a wire rack to cool.
Just before serving, garnish with chopped fresh mint leaves and a drizzle of honey glaze.
